name: Molson Coors Beverage Company
description: Molson Coors Beverage Company is a leading international brewing company with a rich history spanning over two centuries. Formed through the merger of Molson of Canada and Coors of the United States, the company produces a diverse portfolio of iconic beverage brands, including Coors Light, Miller Lite, Molson Canadian, and Blue Moon. Headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, Molson Coors operates globally, focusing on brewing high-quality beverages that unite people for all of life's moments while maintaining a strong commitment to sustainability, responsible drinking, and community engagement across its various markets.
